description_long: This is a robust, boxy ambulance vehicle with a white exterior and orange striping along the sides and hood. The vehicle features a reinforced front bumper, large off-road tires, and a roof rack carrying emergency equipment, including a red and tan stretcher or supply pack. The side windows are small and rectangular, and there are visible handles and steps for entry. The rear of the vehicle has a mounted spare tire and vertical orange stripes, with a rear compartment door for patient access. The vehicle bears an emergency services insignia on the side, indicating its official use.
description: A white, boxy ambulance with orange stripes, off-road tires, roof equipment, and emergency insignia, designed for rugged urban or suburban environments.
description_view_0: Front and right side view showing the reinforced bumper, orange hood stripes, side insignia, and roof rack with emergency gear.
description_view_1: Rear and right side view highlighting the spare tire, roof equipment, rear compartment door, and side step.
description_view_2: Rear and left side view displaying the vertical orange stripes, spare tire, and rear access door.
description_view_3: Front and left side view showing the front grille, bumper, and roof rack, with less visibility of the insignia.
attribute_ambulance_signage: emergency services insignia on side, no visible 'AMBULANCE' text
